items.title: SEO Optimized

items.description: Your site adapts perfectly to all screens: mobile, tablet, and desktop. Tested on all browsers.

items.description: Recommendation and setup of the hosting solution best suited to your project and budget.

items.title: GDPR & Legal Notices
items.description: GDPR compliance, privacy policy, and legal notices included to be compliant from launch.

items.title: Training & Autonomy
items.description: Personalized training to manage your content autonomously. Documentation and video tutorials included.

items.question: How is the final price of my website calculated?
items.answer: The price depends on several factors: the number of pages, desired features (forms, booking, online payment...), design complexity, and the volume of content to integrate. After our first discussion, I provide you with a detailed and transparent quote.

items.question: Are there any hidden costs or additional fees?
items.answer: No, I practice a policy of total transparency. The quote includes the entire service. Only hosting (approximately €10-30/month depending on the solution) and domain name (approximately €10-15/year) are recurring fees that you pay directly to the provider.

items.question: Do you offer payment facilities?
items.answer: Yes, payment is generally made in 3 installments: a 30% deposit when ordering, 40% upon design validation, and 30% upon delivery. For large projects, a personalized payment schedule can be arranged.

items.question: How long does it take to create my website?
items.answer: Timelines vary depending on complexity: 2 to 4 weeks for a showcase website, 4 to 8 weeks for e-commerce, and 6 to 12 weeks for a custom web application. A precise schedule is defined together at the beginning of the project.

items.question: What happens after the website is delivered?
items.answer: After delivery, you benefit from 30 days of free support for any questions or minor adjustments. Then, I offer monthly maintenance packages to ensure the sustainability and performance of your site.

cta.title: Ready to launch your project?
cta.description: Get a personalized and free quote in just a few minutes. Describe your project and receive a proposal tailored to your needs and budget.
